title: Kan Paartha Neram Lyrics Yuvan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Karthik
Lyrics by: Kabilan
Song: Kan Paartha Neram
Movie: Yuvan
Music by: Joshua Sridhar

Kan Paartha Neram ennai kavignan aaki sendraale
Kan moodi pogum podhu kanavil vandhu kondrale
Mundhaanai pota poove mulusaai ennai kolladhe
Munjaamin ketta pinnum sirayil ennai thallaadhe

Aval paarvai pattathaale ullam pattaampoochi aachu
Aval paatham pattathaale nenjam pattumethai aachu

[Yaar ivalo, ennal naane ketten
Naan inimel, kannai mooda maaten](2) (Kan Paartha Neram ...)

Kanavaai, Pagal kanavaai
Aval kan parkum thooram varai theriven
Imaiyaai, iru imaiyaai
Andha vin poovai vanavilill varaiven
Ennai kollai kondu odi pona vellai megam neeye
En ellai kodu ellam undhan kaiyin regai thaane

[Yaar ivalo, ennai naane ketten
Naan inimel, kannai mooda maaten](2) (Kan Paartha Neram ...)

Anuvo, anu alavo
Ne paarthale vidiyum endhan poludho
Idhalo, un idhalo
Iru sevvaalai otti konda suvvaiyo
un koondhal meedhu oonjal aadum poovai kandaene
Andha vaasam thaedi kadhal mutti odi vadhen naane

[Yaar ivalo, ennai naane ketten
Naan inimel, kannai mooda maaten](2) (Kan Paartha Neram ...)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kan Paartha Neram?

The song captures the essence of love and longing, with a soothing and romantic melody.

Who is the singer of Kan Paartha Neram?

The song is beautifully sung by Karthik.

Who composed the music for Yuvan?

The music for the movie Yuvan was composed by Joshua Sridhar.

When was the movie Yuvan released?

The movie Yuvan was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kan Paartha Neram from the movie Yuvan is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Karthik, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics by Kabilan evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Joshua Sridhar's music adds a layer of depth, making it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. The song conveys the tender feelings of seeing a loved one and the impact they have on one's heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kan Paartha Neram from the movie Yuvan, where Karthik's soulful voice meets Joshua Sridhar's mesmerizing music. This romantic track, penned by Kabilan, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the soothing rhythms and let the music transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: The moment I saw you, I became a poet. When I close my eyes, you come in my dreams. Don't hurt me like a thorny flower. Even after asking for forgiveness, don't imprison me.
Her gaze touched me, and my heart fluttered like a butterfly. Her footsteps touched me, and my heart felt like a soft mattress.
Who is she, I asked myself. From now on, I won't close my eyes.

In dreams, in daydreams, I can see as far as her eyes can see. Like eyelashes, like two eyelashes, I will bring that colorful flower into the rainbow. You are the white cloud that ran away with my heart. All my boundaries are just the lines on your palm.
Who is she, I asked myself. From now on, I won't close my eyes.

As small as an atom, when you look at me, my time brightens. Is this your magic? The taste of two red lips pressed together, I saw a flower swinging on your hair. Searching for that fragrance, I ran and got lost in love.
Who is she, I asked myself. From now on, I won't close my eyes.
